findings.evidence: `ComoduleCat.lean` mirrors `CoalgCat.Basic`: `structure CoalgCat extends ModuleCat` at `Mathlib/Algebra/Category/CoalgCat/Basic.lean:30`, `ConcreteCategory` at line 75, `ofHom` at line 84, and `HasForget₂ ... ModuleCat` at line 106; the new file has the same sequence at lines 44, 85, 96, and 137.
findings.fix: Add an explicit reference to `Mathlib.Algebra.Category.CoalgCat.Basic` (and/or `Mathlib.LinearAlgebra.QuadraticForm.QuadraticModuleCat`) as the formal pattern for the bundled category and forgetful functor.
findings.issue: The References block credits the roadmap but omits the Mathlib bundled-category pattern this file closely follows.

summary: The new bundled category follows an identifiable Mathlib bundled-category source, but the source is only named in the PR description and not credited in the file itself.
